purpose: Read-only gate readiness evidence for the personality TDK next-batch runtime readback, MBTI64 promotion dry-run, and later sitemap/llms/search propagation gates.

inputs.draft_readback: Optional path to post-draft runtime/readback QA evidence. Missing evidence yields review_required and no promotion approval phrase.
inputs.promotion_dry_run: Optional path to MBTI64 promotion dry-run evidence. Missing evidence yields review_required and no promotion approval phrase.
inputs.artifact_dir: Optional output directory for sanitized readiness evidence.

requires: approval/draft gate evidence is planned and target set matches
runtime/readback QA evidence passes for all three targets
promotion dry-run evidence is planned for all three targets
